name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax provides same-day title loans and lines of credit secured by vehicle titles, accepting most credit types and allowing borrowers to keep driving their cars.
description_long:
TitleMax is an established title loan lender with a physical presence across multiple states including Tennessee. The Memphis Summer Avenue location has been operating since February 2007, providing residents with fast access to emergency cash. The company operates in 11 states (AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI) and maintains multiple locations throughout Memphis.

TitleMax offers two primary products: title pledges/flex lines of credit secured by vehicle titles, and unsecured personal lines of credit. For title-based loans, borrowers provide their vehicle title as collateral, undergo a credit check, and can receive same-day cash while keeping their vehicle. The company also offers unsecured lines of credit available both in-store and online, requiring valid ID, recent bank statements (or proof of income), and SSN for online applications. Both products accept most credit types and advertise competitive rates and quick approval processes.

The Memphis location distinguishes itself through consistently high customer ratings (481 Google reviews, 5.0/5 average) with specific staff members repeatedly mentioned by name (particularly Nicole, Joyce, and Jonathan). The store offers bilingual services and maintains extended hours (9am-7pm most days, 9am-4pm Saturday). The company emphasizes flexibility, allowing customers to withdraw from credit lines all at once or over time up to their limit, and keeping vehicles available for continued use during the loan period.

As a title loan provider, TitleMax serves consumers with immediate cash needs who may not qualify for traditional loans. However, borrowers should recognize that title loans are inherently high-cost emergency products, and the website does not disclose specific APR rates. The focus on vehicle-secured lending means default risk directly impacts vehicle ownership, and the 'keep driving your vehicle' benefit depends on loan performance.
address: 3624 N Belt Line Rd, Sunnyvale, TX 75182

company_info.headquarters: 3624 N Belt Line Rd, Sunnyvale, TX 75182

pros: Same-day cash funding available for approved applicants
Allows borrowers to keep driving their vehicle while loan is active
Accepts most credit types, not solely credit-score dependent
Flexible line of credit withdrawal options (lump sum or over time)
Established location operating since February 2007 with strong local reputation
Bilingual services offered at this location
Extended hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-4pm Saturday) for working customers
High customer satisfaction with 5.0/5 average rating across 481 reviews
cons: No APR or rate information disclosed on website, making cost comparison impossible
Vehicle title held as collateral, creating risk of repossession on default
Title loans are inherently high-cost emergency products, not suitable for ongoing financial needs
Unsecured line of credit limited to 10 states, excluding many borrowers
Limited transparency on payment terms, loan duration, and prepayment penalties
best_for: Vehicle owners needing immediate cash ($500-$5,000 range) for emergencies
Borrowers with poor credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
People with temporary income disruptions who need funds quickly but can repay within weeks/months
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for vehicle owners facing immediate financial emergencies who have poor or limited credit and can repay within a short timeframe. The critical caveat is that title loans are expensive emergency products (specific rates undisclosed) where failure to repay directly risks vehicle repossession—they should only be used when no alternatives exist and repayment is certain.
services: Title pledge loans (vehicle-secured loans with same-day funding)
Title flex lines of credit (draw funds as needed against vehicle title)
Unsecured personal lines of credit (online and in-store)
Online loan management portal for title loans
Online loan management portal for personal loans
